name: University of Energy and Natural Resources (UENR)

fees: Ghanaian Students: Approx. GHC 2,400 per semester
entry_requirements: WASSCE: Passes (A1-D7) in six (6) subjects, at least three of which are credits (A1-C6)
Credit or pass in relevant elective subjects
Aggregate 36 or better
SSSCE/GBCE holders: Aggregate 24 or better
level_note: Offered under the School of Sciences at the University of Energy and Natural Resources (UENR), Sunyani
UENR is a public university specializing in energy, natural resources and applied sciences
